text:
In a small village, there lived a wise old owl named Oliver. Every evening after the sun had set, Oliver would visit the pet shop down the street to listen to the various birds gossip.

One day, a fledgling starbird named Lily fluttered into town. She was bold and ambitious, dreaming of going far beyond the quiet woods in which she'd grown up.

*"I will build a nest elsewhere. I will hatch a brood of young ones. I will build a legacy,"* Lily declared one crisp autumn morning.

She visited Oliver that evening. *"I've heard tales of distant lands,"* she said shyly.

Oliver nodded thoughtfully. *"Well, little Lily, you have big dreams. Perhaps you'll find those lands. I've heard whispers of oceans so deep you could swim away forever."

Lily seemed inspired. *"I will travel westward,"* she said confidently.*
